summary: Iteration 3 frontend testing complete. All requested flows pass end-to-end: Sidebar shows Business section with 4 active items (Dashboard/Register/Patients/Appointments/Check-in/Queue/Display + Billing/Cash drawer/Insurance/Reports) and only Settings under Coming soon. Cash drawer: 4 colored KPIs render, seeded SHF-2002 (Anjali Pawar, Afternoon, 15:05, float ₹3,000) shows as live shift with Open chip; SHF-2001 (Reena, Morning, ₹4,895 cash) shows in closed shifts table; clicking View on its handover fires the seeded handover toast text ('Two pending unpaid invoices…'). Per-staff list shows RD/AP/KM with RD at ₹4,895. Open-new-shift dialog creates a second open shift (count went 1→2). Close-shift dialog: denominations entered (500×2 + 100×10 = ₹2,000) update counted total live; confirming moves SHF-2002 into closed shifts table. Insurance: 4 colored KPI cards render, all 6 seeded claims (CLM-7001..7006) visible, 'Approved' filter narrows to 1 row (CLM-7001). Selecting CLM-7005 (pending) shows 'Submit pre-auth' button; clicking submits and surfaces 3 decision buttons (approve/partial/reject); 'Mark approved' flips status and shows ₹1,500 approved amount. Attach doc on a claim appends a mock document. Reports: 4 tabs (overview/revenue/operations/insurance) all swap content with charts (overview=4 SVGs, revenue=3, operations=2, insurance=2). Visual: cards use rounded-xl, chip system renders status chips with colored dots, pill buttons used for CTAs. Regression of iteration 1 + 2 screens not re-tested individually but no JS errors surfaced during navigation.

issues: PieChart slices (Appointments 'Status mix' and Registrations 'By source') visually appear EMPTY on first render — only the legend is visible, the pie itself does not draw. Triggered by recharts ResponsiveContainer reporting width(-1)/height(-1) during initial mount (same warning chain from iteration 2). The parent uses 'p-4 h-64 grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 items-center' with `<div class='h-full'>` wrapping ResponsiveContainer — `items-center` collapses the child to content height so 'h-full' resolves to 0. Fix: drop `items-center` from the grid (or use `items-stretch`), or replace h-full with an explicit height (e.g. h-56) on the ResponsiveContainer wrapper. Reproduced visually in the post-test screenshot.
Persistent recharts console warnings: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0'. Carried over from iteration 2 — affects pie charts in Overview and Insurance tabs.

action_items: Fix PieChart rendering in Reports Overview tab: remove `items-center` from the `p-4 h-64 grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 items-center` containers (in Status mix + Registrations sections) OR give the pie's wrapper div an explicit height instead of `h-full`. Currently the pies don't paint on first load.
Same fix should be applied to the Insurance tab's 'Claims status mix' donut wrapper (uses identical pattern with `items-center`).
critical_code_review_comments: Reports.jsx still uses `flex/grid items-center` with `h-full` ResponsiveContainer children — recharts cannot derive height from a centered flex/grid child. This is the root cause of the recurring width(-1)/height(-1) warnings and the invisible pies.

CashDrawer.jsx CloseShiftDialog sets cashCollected=expected-openingFloat regardless of counted variance — variance is recorded separately but the persisted cashCollected number is the 'expected' figure, not the counted one. Intentional for the mock but worth documenting.
Insurance.jsx documents upload uses an index key (`key={i}`) which is fine for append-only mock but should switch to a stable id when real uploads exist.
Reports.jsx exportCsv now references shifts+claims so the CSV is more complete; range pill still doesn't affect the underlying dataset (acceptable for mock).
Reports.jsx Revenue tab AreaChart includes a `<Bar>` child — recharts AreaChart accepts Bar children but mixing chart types should use ComposedChart for clarity.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on functional flows; 1 visual regression on pie charts

seed_data_creation: Used existing SEED_SHIFTS and SEED_CLAIMS. During test: opened 1 new shift (default Evening + STF-001 float 3000), closed SHF-2002 with handover note 'Test handover note', submitted+approved CLM-7005 (Kavya Reddy ₹1,500), attached 1 mock doc to CLM-7005. State resets on full refresh (React Context only).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 fully verified via Playwright on the public URL. All 32 functional checks PASS (kpi cards, shift lifecycle, handover toast, per-staff totals, claim filters, submit→approve flow, doc upload, tab switching). Only remaining issue is the pie chart visual regression in Reports (Overview + Insurance tabs) caused by `items-center` collapsing the chart wrapper's height — pies don't draw on first load though the data and legend are correct. Screenshot at the end of the run shows the empty pies clearly. Fix is a 1-line CSS change in Reports.jsx. Console-only warnings (width/height -1) carry over from iteration 2.
rca of the issue: PieChart invisible in Reports → SectionHeader containers wrap `<ResponsiveContainer width='100%' height='100%'>` inside `<div class='h-full'>` placed in a `grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 items-center` parent. `items-center` shrinks the grid items to their intrinsic content height (the legend column has fixed content, the chart column has none), so `h-full` resolves to 0 → recharts gets 0×0 and bails out (logs width(-1)/height(-1) warning). Fix: remove `items-center` (use default `items-stretch`) OR set a fixed height on the chart wrapper div (e.g. `h-56`).
